product.name: Sony Wireless Headphones
product.description: Barely used Sony WH-1000XM4 headphones in excellent condition. Comes with original box, charging cable, and carrying case. Industry-leading noise cancellation and premium sound quality.

product.name: Calculus & Physics Textbooks
product.description: Bundle of calculus and physics textbooks. Perfect for engineering students. Minor highlighting, all pages intact. Great condition.

product.name: Modern Office Chair
product.description: Ergonomic office chair with adjustable height and lumbar support. Perfect for long study sessions. Mesh back for breathability.

product.name: MacBook Pro 2020
product.description: 13-inch MacBook Pro 2020 model. 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD. Works perfectly, minor wear on the case. Includes original charger.

product.name: Computer Science Textbooks
product.description: Complete set of CS textbooks including Data Structures, Algorithms, and Operating Systems. All in great condition with minimal writing.

product.name: Apple AirPods Pro
product.description: Second generation AirPods Pro with noise cancellation. Excellent battery life, comes with all ear tip sizes and charging case.

product.name: Ergonomic Desk Chair
product.description: High-quality ergonomic chair with adjustable armrests and headrest. Perfect for studying. Used for one semester only.

product.name: Engineering Textbook Set
product.description: Complete set of engineering mechanics and thermodynamics books. All current editions with solutions manuals.
